action: Tighten the abstract and introduction so the sham-control failure is the primary headline and the audited-slice scope is stated before any localized CARD-84 gain.
Add one compact paragraph clarifying that the paper contributes a reviewer-facing audit pattern for small-gain DLM claims, not a broad new evaluation framework.
Compress the runtime disclosure so reviewers can immediately distinguish fixed audited-arm conditions from later setup-probe disclosures.
Insert a short artifact-release or rebuild note naming the current-only bundle and the assets that regenerate the main tables and figures.
Polish the appendix artifact inventory to reduce remaining overfull or underfull box warnings.
